violations.description: NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Fronts and sides of some the equipment in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Shelving with plates under griddles and shelf with food scales noted not properly cleaned/maintained.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the ware-washing area noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reach-in cooler door gaskets and interiors of coolers noted not clean.
